headline: Assessing Invesco (IVZ) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback And Strong One Year Rebound
summary: Invesco stock moves and recent performance snapshot Invesco (IVZ) has drawn investor attention after recent trading left the stock at a last close of US$27.35, with returns down 2.9% over the past day and 3.9% over the past week. That near term weakness contrasts with a gain of 15.5% over the past 3 months and a reported 1 year total return of 96.7%. This puts recent price action into a wider performance context for shareholders watching the stock. See our latest analysis for Invesco. For...
